Operation 'delete-/cms/v3/blogs/posts/{objectId}_archive' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects, missing_output_details. The current description is too minimal. AI agents need to understand the destructive nature of this operation and its consequences.

data.current_description: Delete a blog post by ID.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a blog post by its object ID. This operation removes the post from the system and cannot be undone. Returns a 204 No Content response on successful deletion. Requires appropriate permissions to delete the post.
data.reasoning: The current description is too minimal. It lacks information about permanence of the action, what the response indicates, and permission requirements. AI agents need to understand the destructive nature of this operation and its consequences.

data.current_summary: Retrieves all previous versions of a post
data.current_description: Retrieve all the previous versions of a blog post.
data.summary_suggestion: Get all previous versions of a blog post
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all previous versions and revisions of a blog post by its object ID. Returns a collection of VersionBlogPost objects containing version history, timestamps, and modification details. Useful for tracking changes, comparing versions, or reverting to previous content states.
data.reasoning: The current summary uses 'Retrieves' which is less action-oriented than 'Get'. The description lacks context about what version information is returned, the response structure, and use cases. AI agents need to understand what data is available in the response to determine if this operation meets their needs.

data.current_summary: Schedule a post to be published
data.current_description: Schedule a blog post to be published at a specified time.
data.description_suggestion: Schedule a blog post for future publication at a specified date and time. Requires the post ID and desired publish timestamp in the request body. Returns confirmation of the scheduled publication. The post will automatically transition to published status at the scheduled time.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about required inputs (post ID, timestamp format), what is returned, and the side effect of automatic publication. Added specificity about request body requirements, response confirmation, and automatic state transition for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_summary: Retrieve a batch of Blog Posts
data.current_description: Retrieve a batch of blog posts by ID. identified in the request body.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve multiple blog posts by their IDs specified in the request body. Returns a batch response containing the requested blog post objects. Supports partial success - returns both successful retrievals and any errors encountered for individual posts.
data.reasoning: Original description has grammatical issues ('by ID. identified') and lacks clarity about response format. Added information about batch response handling, partial success behavior, and error reporting to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Explicitly set new languages for each post in a [multi-language group](https://developers.hubspot.com/docs/guides/cms/content/multi-language-content).

message: Operation 'post-/cms/v3/blogs/posts/{objectId}/revisions/{revisionId}/restore-to-draft_restorePreviousVersionToDraft' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary was confusing (says 'restore a draft' but actually restores TO draft). Description lacked clarity about side effects (draft is replaced, published version unchanged) and return value. Improved summary to clarify the action direction and enhanced description with state change details.

data.current_summary: Restore a draft to a previous version
data.current_description: Takes a specified version of a blog post, sets it as the new draft version of the blog post.
data.description_suggestion: Restore a specified previous version of a blog post as the current draft version. This operation sets the selected revision as the new draft, replacing the existing draft content. The published version remains unchanged. Returns the updated BlogPost object with the restored draft content.
data.reasoning: Summary was confusing (says 'restore a draft' but actually restores TO draft). Description lacked clarity about side effects (draft is replaced, published version unchanged) and return value. Improved summary to clarify the action direction and enhanced description with state change details.

data.current_description: Create a new language variation from an existing blog post

data.current_description: Clone a blog post, making a copy of it in a new blog post.
data.description_suggestion: Clone an existing blog post to create a new independent copy. Accepts a ContentCloneRequestVNext object specifying the source blog post. data.current_summary: Detach post from a multi-language group
data.current_description: Detach a blog post from a [multi-language group](https://developers.hubspot.com/docs/guides/cms/content/multi-language-content).
data.description_suggestion: Detach a blog post from its multi-language group. Requires the post ID in the request body. After detachment, the post becomes independent and is no longer synchronized with other language variants in the group. Returns the updated blog post object.

data.current_summary: Delete a batch of blog posts
data.current_description:
Delete a blog post by ID. 
Note: This is not the same as the in-app `archive` function. To perform a dashboard `archive` send an normal update with the `archivedInDashboard` field set to `true`.
data.summary_suggestion: Archive a batch of blog posts
data.description_suggestion: Permanently delete multiple blog posts by their IDs. Accepts a batch of post IDs via BatchInputString. Note: This operation performs permanent deletion, not the dashboard archive function. To archive posts in the dashboard instead, use a standard update with the `archivedInDashboard` field set to `true`. Returns a batch response indicating success or errors for each post.
data.reasoning: Original summary says 'Delete' but operation is tagged as 'archive' and the description mentions archive function, creating confusion. Description is incomplete - doesn't specify input format (BatchInputString), doesn't clarify what is returned, and the distinction from dashboard archive is buried. Improved summary to use 'Archive' terminology, clarified input/output, and reorganized the important distinction about dashboard archive for better AI agent understanding.
